reason: Fix 14: Add missing RedteamCompleted EventName constant for the redteam.completed event
Fix 1: Add 5 new first-class events (ScopeSynthesized, ClaimsAcquired, CheckpointCreated, LaneReturned, RedTeamCompleted) to RuntimeEvent union
Fix 2: Fix toSMEvent - split HistorianComplete to emit SessionCheckpoint, add cases for ScopeSynthesized, ClaimsAcquired, CheckpointCreated, LaneReturned, RedTeamCompleted
Fix 3a: Fix LearningComplete mapping to ScoutCompleted (was PlanProduced)
Fix 3b: Remove CriticComplete from static EVENT_NAME_MAP (handled by runtime logic in toStoreEvent)
Fix 3c: Fix HistorianComplete mapping to SessionCheckpoint (was CampaignCheckpointCreated)
Fix 3d: Add new EVENT_NAME_MAP entries for ScopeSynthesized, ClaimsAcquired, CheckpointCreated, LaneReturned, RedTeamCompleted
Fix 4: Add CriticComplete runtime verdict-checking in toStoreEvent (approved→PlanApproved, rejected→PlanRejected)
Fix 5: Replace STATE_ROLE with full state-to-role mapping including cartographer/critic/redteam/historian states
Fix: Add finding_blocking and redteam_completed to PredicateSpec type union to match new state machine predicates
Fix type error: cast to EventName to satisfy RuntimeEvent eventType field type
Register finding_blocking and redteam_completed resolvers in predicateResolvers map
Add resolveFindingBlocking and resolveRedteamCompleted resolver functions
Fix evidence field type: PredicateResult.evidence is EvidenceRef (singular), not an array
